description: This file implements a set of functions for interacting with a MySQL database to handle persistence of various entities related to a holistic persona recommendation system. It includes functions for upserting and fetching recommendations roles, comparisons, paths multiverse, plan milestones, and profile scoring, all scoped via user, persona, or build identifiers.

methods.name: _jsonParseIfNeeded(v)
methods.description: Parses a value as JSON if it's a string; returns the value as-is if already an object or null.

methods.name: upsertRecommendationsRoles({ userId = null, personaId = null, buildId = null, inferredTags = [], roles })
methods.description: Inserts or updates the latest role recommendations for a specific user, persona, or build.

methods.name: getLatestRecommendationsRoles({ userId = null, personaId = null, buildId = null })
methods.description: Retrieves the most recent role recommendations matching the most specific identifier provided.

methods.name: createRecommendationsCompare({ userId = null, personaId = null, buildId = null, leftRoleId, rightRoleId, comparison })
methods.description: Persists a comparison matrix between two roles associated with a user, persona, or build.

methods.name: getLatestRecommendationsCompare({ buildId = null, leftRoleId, rightRoleId })
methods.description: Fetches the most recent comparison for a specific build or role pair.

methods.name: upsertPathsMultiverse({ userId = null, personaId = null, buildId = null, paths })
methods.description: Stores paths multiverse results scoped by user, persona, or build.

methods.name: getLatestPathsMultiverse({ userId = null, personaId = null, buildId = null })
methods.description: Retrieves the latest paths multiverse data based on priority scope.

methods.name: upsertPlanMilestones({ userId = null, personaId = null, buildId = null, goal, timeframeWeeks, focus = null, milestones })
methods.description: Persists a milestones plan including goal, timeframe, focus, and milestones array.

methods.name: getLatestPlanMilestones({ userId = null, personaId = null, buildId = null })
methods.description: Retrieves the latest milestones plan according to priority scope.

methods.name: upsertProfileScoring({ userId = null, personaId = null, buildId = null, scoring })
methods.description: Stores profile scoring JSON data for a specific user, persona, or build.

methods.name: getLatestProfileScoring({ userId = null, personaId = null, buildId = null })
methods.description: Fetches the most recent profile scoring data based on priority scope.

ctags.name: createRecommendationsCompare
ctags.pattern: /^async function createRecommendationsCompare({ userId = null, personaId = null, buildId = null, l/
ctags.signature: ({ userId = null, personaId = null, buildId = null, leftRoleId, rightRoleId, comparison })

ctags.name: getLatestPathsMultiverse
ctags.pattern: /^async function getLatestPathsMultiverse({ userId = null, personaId = null, buildId = null }) {$/
ctags.signature: ({ userId = null, personaId = null, buildId = null })

ctags.pattern: /^async function getLatestPlanMilestones({ userId = null, personaId = null, buildId = null }) {$/
ctags.signature: ({ userId = null, personaId = null, buildId = null })

ctags.pattern: /^async function getLatestProfileScoring({ userId = null, personaId = null, buildId = null }) {$/
ctags.signature: ({ userId = null, personaId = null, buildId = null })

ctags.name: getLatestRecommendationsCompare
ctags.pattern: /^async function getLatestRecommendationsCompare({ buildId = null, leftRoleId, rightRoleId }) {$/

ctags.name: getLatestRecommendationsRoles
ctags.pattern: /^async function getLatestRecommendationsRoles({ userId = null, personaId = null, buildId = null }/
ctags.signature: ({ userId = null, personaId = null, buildId = null })

ctags.pattern: /^async function upsertPathsMultiverse({ userId = null, personaId = null, buildId = null, paths })/
ctags.signature: ({ userId = null, personaId = null, buildId = null, paths })

ctags.pattern: /^async function upsertPlanMilestones({ userId = null, personaId = null, buildId = null, goal, tim/
ctags.signature: ({ userId = null, personaId = null, buildId = null, goal, timeframeWeeks, focus = null, milestones })

ctags.pattern: /^async function upsertProfileScoring({ userId = null, personaId = null, buildId = null, scoring }/
ctags.signature: ({ userId = null, personaId = null, buildId = null, scoring })

ctags.name: upsertRecommendationsRoles
ctags.pattern: /^async function upsertRecommendationsRoles({ userId = null, personaId = null, buildId = null, inf/
ctags.signature: ({ userId = null, personaId = null, buildId = null, inferredTags = [], roles })
